title: Sphera AI
Summary: Sphera AI embeds AI across Sphera's sustainability, EHS, life cycle assessment, product stewardship and supply chain resilience solutions. It uses Sphera's data foundation, including proprietary emissions factors and verified LCA datasets, to generate product carbon footprints, audit-ready emissions data, supplier risk intelligence, predictive EHS insights, regulatory guidance and context-aware recommendations for operational resilience.
